title: TicTacToeX
description: Adds TicTacToe to minecraft with cash or friendly matches
body:
# 🎮 Advanced Interactive Gaming Experience

Transform your server with an immersive tic-tac-toe experience that goes beyond the classic game. This comprehensive plugin delivers both competitive cash matches and casual friendly games through an intuitive GUI system that keeps players engaged and entertained.

## ✨ Core Features

**💰 Dual Game Modes**
- **Cash Games**: Players wager real money with automatic pot distribution to winners
- **Friendly Matches**: Zero-stakes gameplay for pure fun and practice

**🎯 Seamless GUI Experience**
- Beautiful, responsive inventory-based game interface
- Visual player indicators with color-coded symbols (X/O)
- Real-time turn tracking and game state updates
- Secure inventory protection preventing item manipulation

**💎 Smart Economy Integration**
- Full Vault compatibility for economy transactions
- Automatic bet validation and fund verification
- Instant payouts for winners, automatic refunds for draws
- Configurable minimum and maximum betting limits

**⚡ Intelligent Game Management**
- Robust invite system with accept/deny mechanics
- Auto-expiring invitations to prevent spam
- Anti-cheat protection with turn validation
- Graceful handling of player disconnections

## 🚀 Advanced Functionality

**🔧 Extensive Customization**
- Fully configurable messages, colors, and materials
- Adjustable game timeouts and invitation expiry
- Custom sound effects for enhanced immersion
- Flexible UI themes and layouts

**🎵 Audio Enhancement**
- Dynamic sound feedback for moves and game events
- Victory fanfares and defeat notifications
- Customizable volume and pitch controls
- Professional audio cues for better UX

**🛡️ Rock-Solid Security**
- Prevention of inventory item theft or duplication
- Session management with automatic cleanup
- Money transaction rollback on game interruption
- Anti-exploitation measures throughout

## 📊 Why Choose This Solution?

**Performance Optimized**: Lightweight design with minimal server impact and efficient memory usage patterns.

**Developer Friendly**: Clean, well-documented code architecture with extensive configuration options and easy customization paths.

**Player Focused**: Intuitive commands, clear visual feedback, and engaging gameplay mechanics that keep users coming back.

**Economy Safe**: Bulletproof transaction handling with comprehensive error recovery and audit trails.

**Future Proof**: Built with modern Minecraft versions in mind, regular updates, and backward compatibility support.

## 🎯 Perfect For

- **Economy Servers**: Add a fun money sink with gambling elements
- **Community Servers**: Foster player interaction through friendly competition  
- **Mini-game Networks**: Complement existing game suites with classic appeal
- **Casual Servers**: Provide light entertainment during downtime

## 📋 Quick Setup

Simple installation process with automatic configuration generation. Works out-of-the-box with sensible defaults, while offering deep customization for advanced users. Compatible with all major economy plugins through Vault integration.

**Commands:**
- `/tictactoe cash <player> <amount>` - Challenge someone to a money match
- `/tictactoe friendly <player>` - Start a casual game
- `/tttaccept` - Accept pending invitations
- `/tttdeny` - Decline game requests

Experience the perfect blend of nostalgia and innovation. Whether your players are looking for high-stakes competition or casual entertainment, this plugin delivers a polished, feature-rich gaming experience that stands out in today's crowded plugin marketplace.
